kiroshi_optical_mk1.name: Kiroshi Optical Implant Mk.1
kiroshi_optical_mk1.description: A basic cybernetic eye. Provides zoom capability and targeting data overlay. The industry standard.
kiroshi_optical_mk1.lore: Kiroshi Optics. The eyes of Night City.

kiroshi_optical_mk2.name: Kiroshi Optical Implant Mk.2
kiroshi_optical_mk2.description: Enhanced optics with threat assessment, enemy health display, and extended zoom.
kiroshi_optical_mk2.lore: See through walls. See through lies. See everything.

kiroshi_optical_mk3.name: Kiroshi Optical Implant Mk.3
kiroshi_optical_mk3.description: Military-grade optical array. Identifies enemy weaknesses. Tracks multiple targets simultaneously.
kiroshi_optical_mk3.lore: Used by MaxTac and Arasaka spec ops. Now available for those who can afford it.

gorilla_arms.name: Gorilla Arms
gorilla_arms.description: Subdermal pistons and reinforced chrome arms. Rip open doors, vehicles, and people.
gorilla_arms.lore: The preferred chrome of Animals gang members. Among others.

mantis_blades.name: Mantis Blades
mantis_blades.description: Retractable mono-edge blades housed in your forearms. Silent. Elegant. Lethal.
mantis_blades.lore: Originally developed for corporate infiltration. Now they're everywhere.

monowire.name: Monowire
monowire.description: A monomolecular wire launched from your palm. Conducts electricity. Slices through almost anything.
monowire.lore: The Voodoo Boys use these. Draw your own conclusions.

projectile_launch.name: Projectile Launch System
projectile_launch.description: A miniaturized rocket launcher built into your forearm. For when subtle just isn't in the cards.
projectile_launch.lore: Originally a Militech military contract. Somehow ended up on the black market.

titanium_bones.name: Titanium Bones
titanium_bones.description: Titanium-plated skeletal structure. Your bones won't break. Everything you hit might.
titanium_bones.lore: Favored by Maelstrom and 6th Street soldiers alike.

dense_marrow.name: Dense Marrow
dense_marrow.description: Reinforced bone marrow increases impact force. Makes your punches hit harder.
dense_marrow.lore: Budget chrome. Gets the job done.

synaptic_signal_optimizer.name: Synaptic Signal Optimizer
synaptic_signal_optimizer.description: Optimizes neural pathways for maximum reaction speed. Learn faster. Move faster. Die slower.
synaptic_signal_optimizer.lore: Military prototype. 15% faster skill acquisition. The corpo who designed it never saw a yen.

blood_pump.name: Blood Pump
blood_pump.description: Triggers an emergency adrenaline and synthetic blood surge. Active ability: heal 30 HP in combat (3-turn cooldown).
blood_pump.lore: Emergency medicine made into a permanent lifestyle choice.

syn_lungs.name: Syn-Lungs
syn_lungs.description: Synthetic lung inserts with an integrated air filter and enriched oxygen delivery system.
syn_lungs.lore: Essential for Night City's air quality. Basically mandatory if you spend time in Santo Domingo.

second_heart.name: Second Heart
second_heart.description: A cybernetic backup heart. When your primary heart stops, this one takes over — instantly reviving you with 50 HP.
second_heart.lore: There are no second chances in Night City. Except when you buy one.

subdermal_armor.name: Subdermal Armor
subdermal_armor.description: Armor plating embedded beneath the skin. Invisible protection that feels completely natural. Until someone tries to stab you.
subdermal_armor.lore: The choice of bodyguards and paranoid executives worldwide.

heat_converter.name: Heat Converter
heat_converter.description: Converts absorbed thermal energy into a defensive layer. Fire and heat? Not your problem anymore.
heat_converter.lore: Originally designed for firefighters. Adapted for combat use almost immediately.

neural_link_basic.name: Neural Link
neural_link_basic.description: The most basic neural interface. Required for running any operating system cyberware.
neural_link_basic.lore: If you're reading this, you probably already have one. Welcome to the future.

kerenzikov.name: Kerenzikov
kerenzikov.description: Slows time during combat when dodging or sliding. Named after its inventor, who claimed it would revolutionize warfare. He was right.
kerenzikov.lore: Banned in sanctioned competitions. Absolutely worth it.

synaptic_accelerator.name: Synaptic Accelerator
synaptic_accelerator.description: Boosts neural transmission speed beyond biological limits. React faster than human possible.
synaptic_accelerator.lore: Military classified for three years. Now available at quality ripperdocs.

sandevistan_mk1.name: Sandevistan Mk.1
sandevistan_mk1.description: Slows the world around you while you move at full speed. Active ability: grant +20 bonus damage for 2 turns (4-turn cooldown).
sandevistan_mk1.lore: Used by corpo spec ops and dangerous mercs. You know the type.

sandevistan_mk4.name: Sandevistan Mk.4
sandevistan_mk4.description: The most advanced Sandevistan on the market. Top-tier time dilation. Used by the most dangerous operatives alive.
sandevistan_mk4.lore: David Martinez used a version of this. You know how that ended.

berserk_basic.name: Berserk Basic
berserk_basic.description: Floods your system with combat stimulants. Active ability: deal +20 melee damage for 3 turns (5-turn cooldown).
berserk_basic.lore: The choice of Maelstrom and anyone who wants to feel invincible. Briefly.

berserk_legendary.name: Berserk Mk.5
berserk_legendary.description: Military-grade combat stimulant system. Makes you nigh-unstoppable for short bursts. The price is your sanity.
berserk_legendary.lore: Extremely popular among Animals lieutenants. Equally popular on the black market.

cyberdeck_basic.name: Cyberdeck Basic
cyberdeck_basic.description: Entry-level netrunner deck. Gives you access to basic quickhacks. The first step into the Net.
cyberdeck_basic.lore: NetWatch doesn't like these. That's probably a recommendation.

cyberdeck_raven.name: Raven Microcyber
cyberdeck_raven.description: A high-end netrunner deck with exceptional RAM recovery. Favored by Voodoo Boys and corpo shadow operatives.
cyberdeck_raven.lore: If you're running this, you're playing a different game than everyone else.

projectile_launch_system_face.name: Facial Reconstructive Plating
projectile_launch_system_face.description: Reinforced facial structure with subdermal plating. A walking intimidation factor.
projectile_launch_system_face.lore: You won't be winning any beauty contests. The enemy won't be winning any fights.

immune_system_booster.name: Immune System Booster
immune_system_booster.description: An engineered immune system overlay that neutralizes toxins and accelerates healing.
immune_system_booster.lore: Night City's air, water, and food all want to kill you. So does everyone in it. Priorities.
